description_long: This object is a modern, rectangular grave monument constructed from dark gray granite. The structure features a flat, elevated slab that serves as the grave cover, resting on a slightly wider base. At the head of the grave is a tall, upright headstone with a stepped design on one side, adding a subtle asymmetrical detail. The headstone is thick and solid, with two shallow rectangular recesses near the top, possibly for decorative or symbolic purposes. The entire surface has a consistent, speckled granite texture, giving it a polished and durable appearance. There are no visible inscriptions, engravings, or decorative elements such as crosses or statues.
description: A modern, rectangular granite grave with a flat slab and a tall, stepped headstone. The surface is dark gray and polished, with no visible inscriptions or decorations.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the grave, the flat slab, and the tall headstone with stepped detail and two shallow recesses.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the headstone and the layered structure of the grave base and slab.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the headstone and the base, with the stepped detail visible on the right side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the headstone's thickness and the clean, uninterrupted lines of the grave's structure.
